tweet_text: 🚨 Lexi Potter shines on her full debut, scoring the winner as Chelsea beats Brighton 2-1! This victory sees Chelsea leapfrog Manchester United, who drew with West Ham. #WSL #ChelseaFC
article_title: WSL roundup: Lexi Potter makes grade as Chelsea leapfrog Manchester United

tweet_text: 🚨 Galatasaray's Noa Lang stays in Liverpool for surgery after suffering an injury during their match, where he left the pitch in visible pain. Wishing him a speedy recovery! 🩺⚽ #Galatasaray #NoaLang
article_title: Galatasaray issue statement as Noa Lang remains in Liverpool for surgery after injury

tweet_text: 🚨 Lionel Messi scores his 900th career goal in Inter Miami's Concacaf Champions Cup match, but the team exits after facing Nashville SC. What a milestone! ⚽️🥳 #Messi900 #InterMiami
article_title: Messi scores 900th goal, but Miami exits CCC
